rationale: Both candidates independently rediscover the ground-truth insight (yJader's inline comment) that both submit_initial and submit_update reject list prompts, so removing the already_submitted gate is correct — X states this cleanly and grounds it with exact line citations, then correctly recommends APPROVE, matching the actual LGTM/APPROVED outcome. Y buries the same correct conclusion in a 'sweep' note but then contradicts itself by re-raising the identical point three times as unresolved 'major'/'minor' findings demanding confirmation of something it already verified, and lands on REQUEST CHANGES — directly at odds with the two real approvals, which tanks its precision despite superficially thorough, well-cited prose.
